prompt: A surreal, minimalist architectural diptych. Left panel: A close-up of a marble staircase ascending sharply into bright light. insight: At the aggregate level, men had a 44% admission rate vs 35% for women. However, when stratified by department, women actually had higher admission rates in most departments.
